item.name: Turali Loach
item.description:
This tubular wavekin inhabits the waters of Karvarhur the First, where it can often be seen burrowing in the silt at the bottom of the lake.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Although a variety of loach species are present throughout Tural, this one in particular has by far the most ancient lineage. Fitting, perhaps, that this progenitor should call Karvarhur the First home.
